files.title: Eternalgy Solar: Your Trusted Malaysian Solar PV Partner
files.summary: Eternalgy is a premium Malaysian solar PV provider distinguished by its engineering quality, in-house delivery team, and extensive certifications including CIDB G3 and SEDA registration. With 140 projects completed in a single month, they serve clients from residential terraces to industrial factories.

files.title: JinkoSolar Tiger Neo 3.0: High-Efficiency Solar Panels for Malaysian Climates
files.summary: The JinkoSolar Tiger Neo 3.0 is an N-type TOPCon solar panel series built on the HOT 4.0 platform, designed specifically to excel in Malaysia's hot, humid tropical conditions with up to 24.80% efficiency and superior temperature performance.

files.title: SAJ Solar Inverters and Energy Storage Systems Product Range
files.summary: SAJ (Guangzhou Sanjing Electric) offers a comprehensive range of string inverters and all-in-one energy storage systems for residential and commercial applications, featuring high-efficiency conversion, modular battery architecture, and intelligent software integration.

files.title: Malaysia Solar Scheme
Solar ATAP Malaysia: Complete Guide to Malaysia's New Rooftop Solar Scheme
files.summary: Solar ATAP (Solar Accelerated Transition Action Programme) is Malaysia's new rooftop solar framework that replaced NEM 3.0 on January 1, 2026, eliminating national capacity quotas and introducing net billing with monthly credit resets. This guide covers eligibility, billing calculations, application process, financial incentives, and key differences from previous schemes.
